symptoms.symptom_name: Long-standing comedones and intermittent papulopustular spots on face and upper trunk

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Comedones plus a papulopustular/truncal background are the defining substrate of acne and argue against rosacea and simple folliculitis.
Comedones and truncal involvement are not features of rosacea.

symptoms.symptom_name: Deep tender nodulocystic lesions that enlarged over 48h and ruptured with purulent discharge

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Deep nodulocystic lesions define severe (nodulocystic) acne and predict scarring risk.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: facial cellulitis / secondary bacterial soft-tissue infection
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Purulence alone is non-specific — it occurs in ruptured acne cysts and must not by itself trigger a cellulitis label.

symptoms.symptom_name: Peri-lesional erythema without a sharply-demarcated advancing border

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: facial cellulitis / secondary bacterial soft-tissue infection
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A non-advancing reactive rim argues against spreading cellulitis; a firm demarcated advancing edge would argue strongly FOR it.
Reactive peri-lesional erythema is expected around deep inflamed/ruptured cysts.

symptoms.symptom_name: No fever/rigors and no periorbital or visual involvement (systemic/orbital screen negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: facial cellulitis / secondary bacterial soft-tissue infection
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of systemic toxicity and periorbital signs makes a serious spreading/orbital infection unlikely and supports outpatient management with safety-netting.
A low-grade reactive temperature fits intense local inflammation; it is patient-obtainable and unverified, and does not by itself indicate systemic infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fluctuance on palpation and absence of regional lymphadenopathy

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fluctuant cysts without lymphadenopathy fit deep inflammatory acne; this is a clinician-measured sign sealed from the AI Doctor, which must reason from history instead.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bacterial swab MC&S of purulent discharge
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Only if lesions fail to respond or recurrent/atypical infection is suspected — not required to start empirical therapy for a clinically evident acne flare.
Not indicated in a systemically-well patient; ordering them reflects over-investigation of a clinical diagnosis.
